_comment: Improved Pterodactyl Egg for Icecast AutoDJ Radio Streaming
name: Icecast-AutoDJ-Radio-Enhanced
author: wegj1@hotmail.com
description: Enhanced Icecast radio streaming server with AutoDJ capabilities. Supports automated playlist streaming with customizable configurations for mount points, bitrates, and stream metadata.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash

# Improved Installation Script for Icecast AutoDJ Radio
# Enhanced with error handling, logging, and validation

set -e

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

log_info() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[INFO]${NC} $1"
}

log_warn() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARN]${NC} $1"
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"
}

check_command() {
    if ! command -v $1 &> /dev/null; then
        log_error "Required command '$1' not found"
        return 1
    fi
    return 0
}

log_info "Starting Icecast AutoDJ installation..."

cd /mnt/server || {
    log_error "Failed to access /mnt/server directory"
    exit 1
}

log_info "Validating required commands..."
check_command git || exit 1
check_command chmod || exit 1

log_info "Cleaning up any existing installation..."
if [ -d "icecast-autodj" ]; then
    log_warn "Existing installation found, removing..."
    rm -rf icecast-autodj
fi

log_info "Cloning Icecast AutoDJ repository..."
GIT_REPO="https://github.com/zeropointbruh/icecast-autodj.git"
log_info "Repository: $GIT_REPO"

git clone "$GIT_REPO" icecast-autodj || {
    log_error "Failed to clone repository from $GIT_REPO"
    exit 1
}

log_info "Setting up permissions..."
cd icecast-autodj || exit 1
chmod +x run.sh || {
    log_error "Failed to set executable permissions on run.sh"
    exit 1
}

log_info "Backing up default Icecast configuration..."
if [ -f /etc/icecast2/icecast.xml ]; then
    mv /etc/icecast2/icecast.xml /etc/icecast2/icecast.bcp.xml 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Could not backup default config"
fi

log_info "Copying Icecast configuration..."
if [ -f configs/icecast.xml ]; then
    cp configs/icecast.xml /mnt/server/icecast.xml || {
        log_error "Failed to copy icecast.xml"
        exit 1
    }
else
    log_error "icecast.xml not found in configs directory"
    exit 1
fi

log_info "Setting up ezstream configuration..."
mkdir -p /etc/ezstream || {
    log_error "Failed to create /etc/ezstream directory"
    exit 1
}

if [ -f configs/ezstream.v1.xml ]; then
    cp configs/ezstream.v1.xml /mnt/server/ezstream.xml || {
        log_error "Failed to copy ezstream.xml"
        exit 1
    }
else
    log_error "ezstream.v1.xml not found in configs directory"
    exit 1
fi

log_info "Creating playlist file..."
touch /mnt/server/playlist.m3u || {
    log_error "Failed to create playlist.m3u"
    exit 1
}

if [ ! -f /etc/ezstream/playlist.m3u ]; then
    ln -sf /mnt/server/playlist.m3u /etc/ezstream/playlist.m3u 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Could not create symlink for playlist"
fi

log_info "Setting up directory structure..."
mkdir -p /mnt/server/music || {
    log_error "Failed to create music directory"
    exit 1
}

mkdir -p /mnt/server/log || {
    log_error "Failed to create log directory"
    exit 1
}

if [ ! -d /var/log/icecast2 ]; then
    ln -sf /mnt/server/log /var/log/icecast2 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Could not create symlink for logs"
fi

log_info "Setting ownership permissions..."
if id -u icecast2 &>/dev/null; then
    chown -R icecast2:icecast /etc/ezstream 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Could not set ownership on ezstream"
    chown -R icecast2:icecast /mnt/server/music 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Could not set ownership on music directory"
    chown -R icecast2:icecast /mnt/server/log 2>/dev/null || log_warn "Could not set ownership on log directory"
else
    log_warn "icecast2 user not found, skipping ownership changes"
fi

log_info "Verifying installation..."
ERRORS=0

[ ! -f /mnt/server/icecast.xml ] && { log_error "icecast.xml not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -f /mnt/server/ezstream.xml ] && { log_error "ezstream.xml not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -f /mnt/server/playlist.m3u ] && { log_error "playlist.m3u not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -d /mnt/server/music ] && { log_error "music directory not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -d /mnt/server/log ] && { log_error "log directory not found"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }
[ ! -x /mnt/server/icecast-autodj/run.sh ] && { log_error "run.sh not executable"; ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); }

if [ $ERRORS -gt 0 ]; then
    log_error "Installation completed with $ERRORS error(s)"
    exit 1
fi

log_info "Installation completed successfully!"
log_info "Upload your music files to the /music directory"
log_info "Access web interface at http://YOUR_IP:PORT"
log_info "Default admin credentials are set via environment variables"

exit 0

variables.name: Repository URL
variables.description: Git repository URL for the Icecast AutoDJ source code. Leave default to use the official repository.

variables.name: Source Password
variables.description: Password for streaming sources to connect to Icecast. Change this to a secure password.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Password for the Icecast web admin interface. Change this to a secure password.

variables.name: Admin Username
variables.description: Username for the Icecast web admin interface.

variables.name: Relay Password
variables.description: Password for relay servers. Change this to a secure password.

variables.name: Mount Point
variables.description: The mount point where the stream will be accessible (e.g., /stream or /radio.mp3)

variables.name: Max Clients
variables.description: Maximum number of concurrent listeners allowed.

variables.name: Max Sources
variables.description: Maximum number of streaming sources allowed.

variables.name: Stream Format
variables.description: Audio format for the stream (MP3, OGG, OPUS, etc.)

variables.name: Encoder
variables.description: Encoder to use for streaming (e.g., LAME for MP3, Vorbis for OGG)

variables.name: Metadata Program
variables.description: Program to extract metadata from audio files

variables.name: Hostname
variables.description: Hostname or IP address for the radio server

variables.name: Location
variables.description: Geographic location of the server (for metadata)

variables.name: Admin Email
variables.description: Contact email for the server administrator
